problem id: 0dcacfab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01011101 -> 10001011
  00001000 -> 00000001
  11100111 -> 10011100
  10000010 -> 00010000
  01010100 -> 00001010
  11001110 -> 00011001
  11010111 -> 10011010
  11000000 -> 00011000
  10010111 -> 10010010

query: 11101001
predicted answer: 10011101
